prompt: Edit image 1: Apply the color palette (blue, pink, purple) and rounded style from image 2 to the red lines in the rune diagrams. Modify the top right grid cells within the diagrams to include the triangle shape from image 3, integrating it geometrically.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1: For each of the twelve rune diagrams, transform the red line segments. These segments should adopt the rounded-end style and be colored using the blue, pink, and purple palette from image 2. Additionally, in the top-right grid cell of every rune diagram, integrate the right-angled triangle shape from image 3, fitting it geometrically within the cell.
objects: "Mega Man Starforce 2: Mu Rune Guide" title
Introductory text paragraph describing rune collection
Rune names below each diagram (e.g., Kath, Fon, Wol, Mir, Tuk, Zul, Ebesh, Masa, Foh, Fai, Rai, Chan)
Blue rounded-end line segments within rune diagrams
Pink rounded-end line segments within rune diagrams
Purple rounded-end line segments within rune diagrams
Right-angled triangle in the top-right grid cell of each of the twelve rune diagrams
